title: .design/budget.json
description: Shape of .design/budget.json — the Phase 10.1 optimization-layer budget governance file. Consumed by hooks/budget-enforcer.ts on every PreToolUse:Agent spawn. Bootstrap writes the Default Config from reference/config-schema.md if the file is missing.

per_task_cap_usd.description: Hard ceiling per agent spawn (USD). Breach under enforcement_mode=enforce triggers D-02 block.

per_phase_cap_usd.description: Cumulative ceiling across all spawns within the current phase (USD). Read from .design/STATE.md frontmatter `phase:` field.

tier_overrides.description: Per-agent tier override map (agent-name -> tier). Wins over agent frontmatter default-tier per D-04.

auto_downgrade_on_cap.description: When true, hook silently rewrites tier -> haiku at 80% of per_task_cap_usd per D-03; logged as tier_downgraded: true in telemetry.

cache_ttl_seconds.description: TTL (seconds) driving .design/cache-manifest.json entry expiry per D-08 Layer B. Default 3600.

enforcement_mode.description: D-11 enforcement policy. enforce = block + auto-downgrade; warn = print warnings but allow spawn; log = advisory-only telemetry without gating.
